reviews.review_description: Very social game, most people are nice and talkative, some are serious and just want to play, overall game mechanic are good, rarely ever glitches. But most of all, the only reason it’s a 9/10 is because they need to add more online hub environments and lobbies to choose from. But still a very good game

developer_response.body: Hey JJ, so happy you're enjoying the game. More lobby options are coming soon so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
I find myself loosing track of time in the online lobby and staying up late joking around while playing chess with people I’ve just met in this game. 

The game is well made and very fun, hand tracking works great, the game works as it should and I have no complaints whatsoever.

10/10

developer_response.body: Hey Brody1056. Your comment put a smile on my face. Thank you for the kind review and stay tuned because theres so much on the horizon for the game :)).

reviews.review_description:
this game is not only the worst chess vr game its also the worst vr game period one of the main problems is the computerized bots like even the easiest one feels like a chess prodigy and is terrible for new chess players 
0/10 do not reccomend
it is stuck in the being and i cant do anything
I love this game i be chillin with the randoms in here talking bout random stuff but overall good game im just trash at chess

This game is so well designed, hand tracking feature is very good and I love how you can link your Lichess account.

I don't know if it's already a feature but I would reccommend adding a mixed realify feature so you see the surroundings with the chess board and play like that. That would be a very fun output. 

This game can easily cost about 5$, it's very good. If it keeps updating and making it better it can go for about 7-10$ as there already are many VR Chess games.
Everyone is nice and supportive, free, and so calming. I feel like I'm actually good at chess now.

developer_response.body: Hey Dancedjeric! SO glad you're enjoying the game and thank you for your kind review. There is so much more coming to the game as well so stay tuned :)

reviews.review_description: This game is extremely fun and good you never get board in this chess game it’s free in this game everyone is made to feel the chess if your good then it is very addicting and everyone is welcome
No clock in computer games.  Also no free play mode to analyse with a friend or by yourself if you just want to move the pieces around
The recent update fixed all the issues with desync. Works much better now.

Extremely fun
This has been one of the only ways I can play actual real feeling over the board experiences and it’s awesome that it’s completely free! Definitely worth checking out
When I take a piece it just doesn’t take sometimes I think with some little changes though it can be great

developer_response.body: Hey There AKKnight12. Im a solo dev, so often times things like this slip through the cracks, however, I heard you loud and clear and worked hard to fix the bug you mentioned. Please check the game out and test your issue out again. If all is well I would greatly appreciate you reconsidering your review :)

reviews.review_title: Very good chess game but there’s bugs
reviews.review_description: I know this is a new game that is still in development but I request a bug fix. When you turn off auto promote and promote one of your pawns, the game bugs and you can’t move a piece. I don’t know if this happens in PvP chess but it happens to me when I play a bot. Still would give this five stars though

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thanks for the kind review and bringing this bug to our attention. We already have it fixed now on our end and will be including the fix for it in the next patch.

reviews.review_description: This app is great, and I’m excited to see what future updates bring. The passthrough feature is awesome being able to sit in my living room, watch TV, and play virtual chess at the same time feels unreal!
Bad bad badbad badbad bad bad
i just want to have fun in multiplayer lobbies but no one is playing and i log on every day just to play it

developer_response.body: Hey there El.Rafa. I appreciate the feedback. We are working hard to add more features and polish, and bring more life to the game. We added a new lobby feature that we think will make the game feel much more alive. Please check the game out and test your issue out again. If all is well I would greatly appreciate you reconsidering your review :)

reviews.review_description: I like it... BUT! why cant we do special moves like en passants?????!??!?!!?!?! Please add

developer_response.body: Hey there Danj3r. Special moves like en passant, and under promotion are indeed implemented in the game. Please feel free to double check and let me know what you find.

reviews.review_description: First few computer difficulties are really easy and you move up one difficulty and its unbeatable no matter how much you try

developer_response.body: Hey there. Thanks for bringing this to our attention. We just implemented a completely new computer system so feel free to test it out and let us know what you think at our discord link in game!

reviews.review_description: After looking for a place to play a decent game of chess, I've finally found one! 🙌🏾 Calm atmosphere and great options to choose from and a nice big board...What more do you need?

developer_response.body: Hey Benji, im glad you found our game :). Much more coming soon so keep a close eye!

reviews.review_description: I got this to play with my brother and getting a game was easy, but the voice chat would stop about 30 seconds in. It would also be nice to have a option to play without the clock. It also wouldn't load in during rematch, as in I'd be sitting at the board after sending my brother an invite and he'd be unable to join...and then when we did get together it'd count me sitting at the board without a partner as a loss in my stats because I left. No piece was moved, no opponent sat across from me, but it still was a loss.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate the feedback. The game is still in early access and we are working hard to make the game as bug free as possible. Regarding the option to play without a clock, user feedback is always the number one priority for us, so we will move this feature up as a top priority. If you are interested in offering additional feedback feel free to join the discord as we are very responsive there!

reviews.review_description: I just started i picked beginner but it put me against pro players

developer_response.body: Hey crimsonVR109. Im sorry you had a rough experience with the matching system in my game. Will the game is still growing, I had to make the skill ranges wider so that people can get matched against each other, however we just added an all new lobby mode which should make the issue feel way smoother. Please check the game out again and try out the new lobby mode. If all is well I would greatly appreciate you reconsidering your review :) Thank you

reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game I loved playing with my friend and family but I also love where you can play with other people online!

developer_response.body: Hey Anthony! So glad to hear you're enjoying them game. Stay tuned because there's so much more to come.

reviews.review_description: The environments are awesome.  The new lobby feature was very fun and reminded me of chess parks. 10/10 experience
Since i can play in my Lichess Account I am happy! Im

developer_response.body: Glad to make you happy Nikos! Feel free to join the games official discord to stay up to date on future releases.

reviews.review_description: what to need more?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review. Feel free to join the discord to stay updated on future changes or meet other players!

reviews.review_description:
i am a beginning chess player and i love the passthrough mode and the floating board. The hands-only interface is really intuitive and it's the closest i've felt to playing real chess.
Note i only play offline vs computer.

A few things:

1. Sometimes the computer opponent seems to forget to make its move and i am forced to make it for him to progress the game.
2. It would be nice to see the computer opponent think. Sometimes i wonder if it's still thinking, stuck (see 1) or made its move already. A 'thinking' animation would be nice.
3. Maybe make the actual computer move a bit more visible, animated.. now i usually see what piece moved, but not exactly from where.
4. Maybe add some computer opponents.. floating faces/figurines or something.. if they also move the pieces you'd solve basically 2 and 3.
5. Sometimes the computer forgoes very obvious moves.  But maybe that's because i play on the easiest level.

Love it and would pay for this after it's a bit more streamlined.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your valuable feedback. We have taken a serious note of your recommendations and definitely plan to act on them. If you would like a place to leave more feedback, and a place to keep up with updates as we continue to develop, feel free to join the discord as we regularly update the community on game progress. Stay tuned :)

reviews.review_description: Its so bad

developer_response.body: Hey there Frog Man. If you can get in to the specifics of what you had issues with, we would love to tackle them head on and resolve them. We are a very small team of developers and the game is still in early access. We are working hard to resolve all the bugs, but it is a process and nothing helps us more than user feedback. Please consider joining the discord as it is the best place to leave feedback and help us improve.

reviews.review_description: I honestly kove chess and since i can't play chess at home now i can ty!!
This app is the only right now with lichess support, which is game changer for me

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review. Stay tuned because there is so much more on the horizon for this game :)

reviews.review_description: I have played like 6 games with computer and 4 of this games the computer (bot) stops thinking  and there's nothing more to do, just restart the game

developer_response.body: Hey Skays. I hear you loud and clear. The computer freezing bug has now officially been completely fixed as part of the most recent update. I'm a solo dev, so often times things like this slip through the cracks, however, I really appreciate you leaving feedback to help improve the game for everyone. Please check the game out and test your issue out again. If all is well I would greatly appreciate you reconsidering your review :)

reviews.review_description: While the partnering with LIchess may let you find an opponent on demand, I do not see how the developers can spend all that effort and get the board orientation wrong. h1 is a light square, not a dark square. White on the right, queen on the square of its color. Basic stuff.

developer_response.body: You're very right. This was an oversight in one of the recent patches that we made. This issue only exists on the online opponent version of the board which we are putting a fix for ASAP. I hope you can be patient with us as the game is in early development and we are trying our very best to release more features for the game.

reviews.review_description: Before I download game I was woooooooo, but now I am WEEEEEEEEEE. If you also want to be WEEEEEEEE and not woooooooooo then play.
Just played this game for hours it’s so immersive and realistic! Haven’t played a better chess Sim yet highly recommend!
Trying ot out hope i like it
